content: SBI Personal Loan - Personal Banking एसबीआई व्यक्तिगत ऋण Personal Banking Personal Finance Home Loan Personal Loans Show More Loans To Pensioners Auto Loans Education Loans Gold Loan Retail Loan Offers Loans Against Securities Loans Against Property Calculators IRAC norms SBI Surya Ghar – Loan for Solar Roof Top Pension loans Show Less Show More Loans to Salaried Employees having salary account with SBI Features Eligibility Terms and Conditions Apply Now Whether it’s your wedding or a vacation, unplanned emergency or a planned purchase, get quick approval and instant disbursal with minimal documentation under SBI Personal Loan. Dial 1800 1234 for more information/ applying through Contact Centre. Give a Missed Call on 7208933142 or SMS “PERSONAL” on 7208933145 to get a call back from our Contact Centre. Features Loan up to ₹50 lakhs Low interest rates starting from 10.05%* Low processing charges Minimal documentation Zero hidden costs No security, no guarantor Provision for second loan Digital Document Execution facility Term loan facility on daily reducing balance or Overdraft facility with reducing Drawing Power Click here for latest rate of interest Eligibility Employees working with Government sector (Central Government/ State Government/ Railway/ Police/ PSU) Defence sector (Defence/ Indian Coast Guard/ Central Armed Police) Corporate sector Employee should have Salary Package Account with SBI. Click here to know more about benefits of maintaining Salary Account with SBI Minimum Service: Government/ Defence Sector employees: 6 months Corporate Sector employees: 12 months Age: 21-60 years. Loans to Government/ Defense sector employees in service & having age more than 60 years may be considered on case-to-case basis. Minimum Net Monthly Salary: Government/ Defence Sector employees: ₹20,000/- Corporate Sector employees: ₹25,000/- Loan Amount Minimum: ₹ 1 lakh Maximum: ₹ 50 lakh, subject to EMI/NMI Ratio upto 65% & 30-times NMI, whichever is lower Employee should be an Indian National Employee should have a decent Credit score, as per Bank’s internal policy Terms and Conditions Documents required Permanent Account Number (PAN) 6 months’ Salary Slips Documentary evidence for ascertaining the employment details viz. Identity Card issued by Employer/ Service Certificate/ Contract Letter/ Canteen ID. Latest ITR/ Form 16, if applicable. 6 months’ Salary Account Statement (i.e. account statement(s) where last 6 months’ salary is credited) KYC Documents: Category of customers Instructions Existing to Bank (ETB) customers who are fully KYC compliant and where there is no change in address or other details. No need to submit fresh set of KYC documents. Existing to Bank (ETB) customers where there is any change in address or other details. Need to submit only relevant documents for updation of KYC. Existing to Bank (ETB) customers whose PAN is not seeded in CBS. PAN to be mandatorily obtained. Processing fee: Up to 1.50% of the Loan Amount (subject to mi Category of customers: Existing to Bank (ETB) customers who are fully KYC compliant and where there is no change in address or other details. | Instructions: No need to submit fresh set of KYC documents. Category of customers: Existing to Bank (ETB) customers where there is any change in address or other details. | Instructions: Need to submit only relevant documents for updation of KYC. Category of customers: Existing to Bank (ETB) customers whose PAN is not seeded in CBS. | Instructions: PAN to be mandatorily obtained. Loans to Salaried Employees having salary account with SBI
Low interest rates starting from 10.05%*
Click here for latest rate of interest
Employee should have Salary Package Account with SBI. Click here to know more about benefits of maintaining Salary Account with SBI
Minimum Net Monthly Salary: Government/ Defence Sector employees: ₹20,000/- Corporate Sector employees: ₹25,000/-
Loan Amount Minimum: ₹ 1 lakh Maximum: ₹ 50 lakh, subject to EMI/NMI Ratio upto 65% & 30-times NMI, whichever is lower
Maximum: ₹ 50 lakh, subject to EMI/NMI Ratio upto 65% & 30-times NMI, whichever is lower

Documents required Permanent Account Number (PAN) 6 months’ Salary Slips Documentary evidence for ascertaining the employment details viz. Identity Card issued by Employer/ Service Certificate/ Contract Letter/ Canteen ID. Latest ITR/ Form 16, if applicable. 6 months’ Salary Account Statement (i.e. account statement(s) where last 6 months’ salary is credited) KYC Documents:
6 months’ Salary Account Statement (i.e. account statement(s) where last 6 months’ salary is credited)

Processing fee: Up to 1.50% of the Loan Amount (subject to minimum ₹1000/- & maximum ₹15000/-), plus GST. Defense sector employees: 100% waiver Platinum & Rhodium variant Salary Package customers: 100% waiver Government sector employees: 50% waiver i.e., 0.75% of the loan amount plus GST (Minimum ₹1000/- & Maximum ₹15000/-, plus GST Customers having CIC (CIBIL) Score of >= 800: 50% waiver i.e., 0.75% of the loan amount plus GST (Minimum ₹1000/- & Maximum ₹15000/-, plus GST)
Defense sector employees: 100% waiver
Platinum & Rhodium variant Salary Package customers: 100% waiver
Government sector employees: 50% waiver i.e., 0.75% of the loan amount plus GST (Minimum ₹1000/- & Maximum ₹15000/-, plus GST
Customers having CIC (CIBIL) Score of >= 800: 50% waiver i.e., 0.75% of the loan amount plus GST (Minimum ₹1000/- & Maximum ₹15000/-, plus GST)

Penal Charge: In the event of default in payment of any instalment or any irregularity in the loan account, penal charges at following rate will be applicable: Irregularity upto 60 Days: 2.40% per annum on the irregular portion for the period of irregularity. Continuous irregular for a period beyond 60 days: 5% per annum on the irregular portion for the period of irregularity.
Irregularity upto 60 Days: 2.40% per annum on the irregular portion for the period of irregularity.
Continuous irregular for a period beyond 60 days: 5% per annum on the irregular portion for the period of irregularity.
Any prepayment of EMIs in full or in part and closure of account before the end of term will attract the prepayment charges of 2% of the prepaid amount

Pre-payment charges may be waived for following category of customers: Loans of Defense sector employees, being closed after 6 months from date of sanction. Loans of Government/ Corporate sector employees, being closed after 3 years from date of sanction, or from the proceeds of a new loan account opened under the same scheme after 6 months from date of sanction. Loans of Platinum & Rhodium variant of Corporate Salary package customers, being closed after 6 months from date of sanction
Loans of Platinum & Rhodium variant of Corporate Salary package customers, being closed after 6 months from date of sanction
Repayment of EMIs will be through Standing Instructions (SI) on the Salary Package account till the outstanding in the loan account becomes nil.
